race.comment: Tough race. GHETTO SUPASTAR (3) resumes off a short spell. His form tapered at the end of last campaign but his best figures have him very well placed, albeit over slightly further. He should have residual fitness and this is winnable. MOVE THE TORANA (8) was a BM56 winner two back, good again in this grade last time at 20-1 when getting into third. She should take holding out again. ELEANOR DUMONT (5) has won two of her past three, getting the upper hand very late here over 1400m last start. Up in trip should suit nicely now, she'll go close again. SHAHZAD (1) resumes. We haven't seen his best for a bit but he usually comes to hand quickly and his best is good enough. DESIGNS OF EIGHT (10) is going well and should relish getting to a mile now.
